title: poset_phase v2.0.0: Action-Weighted Poset Ensemble Analysis — Including Prediction A (Dimension-Agnostic Geometric Dominance)
description: Exact numerical framework for studying geometric phase transitions in finite partially ordered sets (posets). v2.0.0 adds Prediction A: demonstrating that consistency-based actions (without dimension-specific priors) naturally select higher-dimensional Lorentzian structures. Includes code for 4D Lorentzian family generation, dimension scan experiments (N=20–72), seed sensitivity analysis, geometric ablation, and two complete LaTeX manuscripts. Companion paper: 'Bounded Geometric Phase Transition in Finite Causal Posets with Exact Entropy'. Prediction A paper: 'Dimension-Agnostic Geometric Dominance in Finite Causal Posets: Higher-Dimensional Lorentzian Structures Emerge Under Consistency-Based Actions'.
notes: This software accompanies two manuscripts: (1) 'Bounded Geometric Phase Transition in Finite Causal Posets with Exact Entropy' (companion paper), and (2) 'Dimension-Agnostic Geometric Dominance in Finite Causal Posets' (Prediction A). AI tools (Claude, Anthropic) assisted with code development and analysis.
